product: Genie Space and Databricks Assistant on Databricks on AWS GovCloud GA
tagline: Databricks on AWS GovCloud support: Genie and Databricks Assistant are now generally available on Databricks on AWS GovCloud.
what_it_does: Databricks on AWS GovCloud support: Genie and Databricks Assistant are now generally available on Databricks on AWS GovCloud. This page describes the Databricks on AWS GovCloud offering and its compliance controls. AWS GovCloud overview AWS GovCloud gives United States government customers and their partners the flexibility to architect secure cloud solutions that comply with the FedRAMP High baseline and other compliance regimes, including United States International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) and Export Administration Regulations (EAR).
why_it_matters: AWS GovCloud overview AWS GovCloud gives United States government customers and their partners the flexibility to architect secure cloud solutions that comply with the FedRAMP High baseline and other compliance regimes, including United States International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) and Export Administration Regulations (EAR).
